name: 01_location_care_site.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 01_location_care_site.sql
-- Populate location and care_site tables
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- location: single record for Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DELETE FROM location;
INSERT INTO location (location_id, address_1, address_2, city, state, zip, county, location_source_value)
SELECT
    1                       AS location_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR           AS address_1,
    NULL::VARCHAR           AS address_2,
    NULL::VARCHAR           AS city,
    'MA'                    AS state,
    NULL::VARCHAR           AS zip,
    NULL::VARCHAR           AS county,
    'Beth Israel Hospital'  AS location_source_value
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- care_site: one record per distinct careunit from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".transfers
-- Use source_to_concept_map for place_of_service mapping
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DELETE FROM care_site;
INSERT INTO care_site (care_site_id, care_site_name, place_of_service_concept_id, location_id, care_site_source_value, place_of_service_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)              AS care_site_id,
    src.careunit                                AS care_site_name,
    COALESCE(stcm.target_concept_id, 0)         AS place_of_service_concept_id,
    1                                           AS location_id,
    src.careunit                                AS care_site_source_value,
    src.careunit                                AS place_of_service_source_value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT careunit
    FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".transfers
    WHERE careunit IS NOT NULL
) src
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map stcm
    ON stcm.source_code = src.careunit
    AND stcm.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_cs_place_of_service'
;

-- Insert BIDMC as a care site
INSERT INTO care_site (care_site_id, care_site_name, place_of_service_concept_id, location_id, care_site_source_value, place_of_service_source_value)
VALUES (
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647), 'BIDMC', 0, 1, 'BIDMC', 'BIDMC'
);

name: 02_person_death.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 02_person_death.sql
-- Populate person and death tables
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- Map ethnicity using source_to_concept_map
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_subject_ethnicity;
CREATE TABLE tmp_subject_ethnicity AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.subject_id,
    FIRST_VALUE(src.race) OVER (
        PARTITION BY src.subject_id
        ORDER BY src.admittime ASC) AS ethnicity_first
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions src
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_ethnicity_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_ethnicity_concept AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.ethnicity_first             AS source_code,
    COALESCE(sc.concept_id, 0)      AS source_concept_id,
    stcm.target_concept_id          AS target_concept_id,
    tc.vocabulary_id                AS target_vocabulary_id
FROM tmp_subject_ethnicity src
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map stcm
    ON UPPER(stcm.source_code) = UPPER(src.ethnicity_first)
LEFT JOIN concept sc
    ON sc.concept_code = stcm.source_code
    AND sc.vocabulary_id = stcm.source_vocabulary_id
LEFT JOIN concept tc
    ON tc.concept_id = stcm.target_concept_id
    AND tc.invalid_reason IS NULL
    AND tc.standard_concept = 'S'
;

-- person_id mapping: subject_id -> person_id (reused by downstream scripts)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_person_map;
CREATE TABLE tmp_person_map AS
SELECT
    p.subject_id,
    abs(hash(CAST(p.subject_id AS VARCHAR)) % 2147483647) AS person_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".patients p
;

DELETE FROM person;
INSERT INTO person (person_id, gender_concept_id, year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth, birth_datetime, race_concept_id, ethnicity_concept_id, location_id, provider_id, care_site_id, person_source_value, gender_source_value, gender_source_concept_id, race_source_value, race_source_concept_id, ethnicity_source_value, ethnicity_source_concept_id)
SELECT
    pm.person_id,
    CASE WHEN p.gender = 'F' THEN 8532 WHEN p.gender = 'M' THEN 8507 ELSE 0 END AS gender_concept_id,
    p.anchor_year                       AS year_of_birth,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS month_of_birth,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS day_of_birth,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP                     AS birth_datetime,
    COALESCE(CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id <> 'Ethnicity' THEN map_eth.target_concept_id END, 0) AS race_concept_id,
    COALESCE(CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id = 'Ethnicity'  THEN map_eth.target_concept_id END, 0) AS ethnicity_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS location_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS provider_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS care_site_id,
    CAST(p.subject_id AS VARCHAR)       AS person_source_value,
    p.gender                            AS gender_source_value,
    0                                   AS gender_source_concept_id,
    CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id <> 'Ethnicity' THEN eth.ethnicity_first END AS race_source_value,
    COALESCE(CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id <> 'Ethnicity' THEN map_eth.source_concept_id END, 0) AS race_source_concept_id,
    CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id = 'Ethnicity'  THEN eth.ethnicity_first END AS ethnicity_source_value,
    COALESCE(CASE WHEN map_eth.target_vocabulary_id = 'Ethnicity'  THEN map_eth.source_concept_id END, 0) AS ethnicity_source_concept_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".patients p
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON p.subject_id = pm.subject_id
LEFT JOIN tmp_subject_ethnicity eth ON p.subject_id = eth.subject_id
LEFT JOIN tmp_ethnicity_concept map_eth ON eth.ethnicity_first = map_eth.source_code
;

DELETE FROM death;
INSERT INTO death (person_id, death_date, death_datetime, death_type_concept_id, cause_concept_id, cause_source_value, cause_source_concept_id)
SELECT
    pm.person_id,
    CAST(CASE WHEN src.deathtime <= src.dischtime THEN src.deathtime ELSE src.dischtime END AS DATE) AS death_date,
    CASE WHEN src.deathtime <= src.dischtime THEN src.deathtime ELSE src.dischtime END AS death_datetime,
    32817 AS death_type_concept_id,
    0     AS cause_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR AS cause_source_value,
    0     AS cause_source_concept_id
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT subject_id,
        FIRST_VALUE(deathtime) OVER (PARTITION BY subject_id ORDER BY admittime) AS deathtime,
        FIRST_VALUE(dischtime) OVER (PARTITION BY subject_id ORDER BY admittime) AS dischtime
    FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions
    WHERE deathtime IS NOT NULL
) src
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON src.subject_id = pm.subject_id
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_subject_ethnicity;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_ethnicity_concept;
-- Keep tmp_person_map for downstream scripts

name: 03_visit_occurrence.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 03_visit_occurrence.sql
-- Populate visit_occurrence from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions
-- =====================================================================

-- visit_occurrence_id mapping: hadm_id -> visit_occurrence_id
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_visit_map;
CREATE TABLE tmp_visit_map AS
SELECT
    src.subject_id,
    src.hadm_id,
    abs(hash(CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)) % 2147483647) AS visit_occurrence_id,
    CASE WHEN src.edregtime < src.admittime THEN src.edregtime ELSE src.admittime END AS start_datetime,
    src.dischtime                   AS end_datetime,
    src.admission_type              AS admission_type,
    src.admission_location          AS admission_location,
    src.discharge_location          AS discharge_location,
    CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR) AS source_value
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions src
;

DELETE FROM visit_occurrence;
INSERT INTO visit_occurrence (visit_occurrence_id, person_id, visit_concept_id, visit_start_date, visit_start_datetime, visit_end_date, visit_end_datetime, visit_type_concept_id, provider_id, care_site_id, visit_source_value, visit_source_concept_id, admitted_from_concept_id, admitted_from_source_value, discharged_to_concept_id, discharged_to_source_value, preceding_visit_occurrence_id)
SELECT
    src.visit_occurrence_id,
    pm.person_id,
    COALESCE(lat.target_concept_id, 0)  AS visit_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)    AS visit_start_date,
    src.start_datetime                  AS visit_start_datetime,
    CAST(src.end_datetime AS DATE)      AS visit_end_date,
    src.end_datetime                    AS visit_end_datetime,
    32817                               AS visit_type_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS provider_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS care_site_id,
    src.source_value                    AS visit_source_value,
    COALESCE(sc_lat.concept_id, 0)      AS visit_source_concept_id,
    CASE WHEN src.admission_location IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(la.target_concept_id, 0) ELSE NULL END AS admitted_from_concept_id,
    src.admission_location              AS admitted_from_source_value,
    CASE WHEN src.discharge_location IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(ld.target_concept_id, 0) ELSE NULL END AS discharged_to_concept_id,
    src.discharge_location              AS discharged_to_source_value,
    LAG(src.visit_occurrence_id) OVER (PARTITION BY src.subject_id ORDER BY src.start_datetime) AS preceding_visit_occurrence_id
FROM tmp_visit_map src
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON src.subject_id = pm.subject_id
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map lat ON lat.source_code = src.admission_type      AND lat.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_vis_admission_type'
LEFT JOIN concept sc_lat ON sc_lat.concept_code = lat.source_code AND sc_lat.vocabulary_id = lat.source_vocabulary_id
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map la  ON la.source_code  = src.admission_location  AND la.source_vocabulary_id  = 'mimiciv_vis_admission_location'
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map ld  ON ld.source_code  = src.discharge_location  AND ld.source_vocabulary_id  = 'mimiciv_vis_discharge_location'
;
-- Keep tmp_visit_map and tmp_person_map for downstream scripts

name: 04_visit_detail.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 04_visit_detail.sql
-- Populate visit_detail from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".transfers
-- =====================================================================

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_visit_detail;
CREATE TABLE tmp_visit_detail AS
SELECT
    abs(hash(CAST(tr.transfer_id AS VARCHAR)) % 2147483647) AS visit_detail_id,
    tr.subject_id,
    tr.hadm_id,
    tr.intime                           AS start_datetime,
    COALESCE(tr.outtime, tr.intime)     AS end_datetime,
    tr.careunit,
    CAST(tr.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(tr.transfer_id AS VARCHAR) AS source_value
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".transfers tr
WHERE tr.hadm_id IS NOT NULL
  AND tr.intime IS NOT NULL
;

DELETE FROM visit_detail;
INSERT INTO visit_detail (visit_detail_id, person_id, visit_detail_concept_id, visit_detail_start_date, visit_detail_start_datetime, visit_detail_end_date, visit_detail_end_datetime, visit_detail_type_concept_id, provider_id, care_site_id, admitted_from_concept_id, discharged_to_concept_id, preceding_visit_detail_id, visit_detail_source_value, visit_detail_source_concept_id, admitted_from_source_value, discharged_to_source_value, parent_visit_detail_id, visit_occurrence_id)
SELECT
    src.visit_detail_id,
    pm.person_id,
    COALESCE(stcm.target_concept_id, 0) AS visit_detail_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)    AS visit_detail_start_date,
    src.start_datetime                  AS visit_detail_start_datetime,
    CAST(src.end_datetime AS DATE)      AS visit_detail_end_date,
    src.end_datetime                    AS visit_detail_end_datetime,
    32817                               AS visit_detail_type_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS provider_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS care_site_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS admitted_from_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS discharged_to_concept_id,
    LAG(src.visit_detail_id) OVER (PARTITION BY src.subject_id, src.hadm_id ORDER BY src.start_datetime) AS preceding_visit_detail_id,
    src.source_value                    AS visit_detail_source_value,
    COALESCE(sc.concept_id, 0)          AS visit_detail_source_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS admitted_from_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS discharged_to_source_value,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS parent_visit_detail_id,
    vm.visit_occurrence_id
FROM tmp_visit_detail src
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON src.subject_id = pm.subject_id
LEFT JOIN tmp_visit_map vm ON src.hadm_id = vm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map stcm ON stcm.source_code = src.careunit AND stcm.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_cs_place_of_service'
LEFT JOIN concept sc ON sc.concept_code = stcm.source_code AND sc.vocabulary_id = stcm.source_vocabulary_id
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_visit_detail;
-- Keep tmp_person_map and tmp_visit_map for downstream scripts

name: 05_condition_occurrence.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 05_condition_occurrence.sql
-- Populate condition_occurrence from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".diagnoses_icd
-- =====================================================================

DELETE FROM condition_occurrence;
INSERT INTO condition_occurrence (condition_occurrence_id, person_id, condition_concept_id, condition_start_date, condition_start_datetime, condition_end_date, condition_end_datetime, condition_type_concept_id, condition_status_concept_id, stop_reason, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, condition_source_value, condition_source_concept_id, condition_status_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || src.icd_code || '|' || CAST(src.seq_num AS VARCHAR)) % 2147483647) AS condition_occurrence_id,
    pm.person_id,
    COALESCE(stcm.target_concept_id, 0) AS condition_concept_id,
    CAST(adm.admittime AS DATE)         AS condition_start_date,
    adm.admittime                       AS condition_start_datetime,
    NULL::DATE                          AS condition_end_date,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP                     AS condition_end_datetime,
    32817                               AS condition_type_concept_id,
    0                                   AS condition_status_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS stop_reason,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS provider_id,
    vm.visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS visit_detail_id,
    src.icd_code                        AS condition_source_value,
    COALESCE(sc.concept_id, 0)          AS condition_source_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS condition_status_source_value
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".diagnoses_icd src
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON src.subject_id = pm.subject_id
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions adm ON src.subject_id = adm.subject_id AND src.hadm_id = adm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN tmp_visit_map vm ON src.hadm_id = vm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map stcm
    ON stcm.source_code = src.icd_code
    AND stcm.source_vocabulary_id IN ('ICD9CM', 'ICD10CM')
LEFT JOIN concept sc
    ON sc.concept_code = src.icd_code
    AND sc.vocabulary_id = stcm.source_vocabulary_id
;

name: 06_procedure_occurrence.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 06_procedure_occurrence.sql
-- Populate procedure_occurrence from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".procedures_icd

DELETE FROM procedure_occurrence;
INSERT INTO procedure_occurrence (procedure_occurrence_id, person_id, procedure_concept_id, procedure_date, procedure_datetime, procedure_end_date, procedure_end_datetime, procedure_type_concept_id, modifier_concept_id, quantity, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, procedure_source_value, procedure_source_concept_id, modifier_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || src.icd_code || '|' || CAST(src.seq_num AS VARCHAR)) % 2147483647) AS procedure_occurrence_id,
    pm.person_id,
    COALESCE(stcm.target_concept_id, 0) AS procedure_concept_id,
    CAST(adm.admittime AS DATE)         AS procedure_date,
    adm.admittime                       AS procedure_datetime,
    NULL::DATE                          AS procedure_end_date,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP                     AS procedure_end_datetime,
    32817                               AS procedure_type_concept_id,
    0                                   AS modifier_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS quantity,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS provider_id,
    vm.visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS visit_detail_id,
    src.icd_code                        AS procedure_source_value,
    COALESCE(sc.concept_id, 0)          AS procedure_source_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS modifier_source_value
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".procedures_icd src
INNER JOIN tmp_person_map pm ON src.subject_id = pm.subject_id
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions adm ON src.subject_id = adm.subject_id AND src.hadm_id = adm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN tmp_visit_map vm ON src.hadm_id = vm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN source_to_concept_map stcm
    ON stcm.source_code = src.icd_code
    AND stcm.source_vocabulary_id IN ('ICD9Proc', 'ICD10PCS')
LEFT JOIN concept sc
    ON sc.concept_code = src.icd_code
    AND sc.vocabulary_id = stcm.source_vocabulary_id
;

name: 07_drug_exposure.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 07_drug_exposure.sql
-- Populate drug_exposure from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".prescriptions
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Clean prescriptions and resolve drug names via pharmacy
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_prescriptions_clean;
CREATE TABLE tmp_prescriptions_clean AS
SELECT
    src.subject_id                  AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                     AS hadm_id,
    src.starttime                   AS start_datetime,
    COALESCE(src.stoptime, src.starttime) AS end_datetime,
    src.route                       AS route_source_code,
    src.form_unit_disp              AS dose_unit_source_code,
    CAST(src.ndc AS VARCHAR)        AS ndc_source_code,
    src.form_val_disp               AS form_val_disp,
    TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(src.form_val_disp, '[-]?[\d]+[.]?[\d]*') AS DOUBLE) AS quantity,
    TRIM(COALESCE(
        CASE WHEN src.drug IN ('Bag', 'Vial', 'Syringe', 'Syringe.', 'Syringe (Neonatal)',
                                'Syringe (Chemo)', 'Soln', 'Soln.',
                                'Sodium Chloride 0.9%  Flush')
             THEN pharm.medication
             ELSE src.drug
        END, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(src.prod_strength, ''))  AS gcpt_source_code,
    src.pharmacy_id                 AS pharmacy_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".prescriptions src
LEFT JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".pharmacy pharm
    ON src.pharmacy_id = pharm.pharmacy_id
WHERE src.starttime IS NOT NULL
  AND src.drug IS NOT NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Map NDC codes
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_ndc_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_pr_ndc_concept AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.ndc_source_code     AS source_code,
    vc.concept_id           AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id           AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id          AS target_concept_id
FROM tmp_prescriptions_clean src
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON vc.concept_code = src.ndc_source_code
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'NDC'
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Map custom drug names (drug + prod_strength)
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_gcpt_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_pr_gcpt_concept AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.gcpt_source_code    AS source_code,
    vc.concept_id           AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id           AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id          AS target_concept_id
FROM tmp_prescriptions_clean src
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON vc.concept_code = src.gcpt_source_code
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_drug_ndc'
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Map route
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_route_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_pr_route_concept AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.route_source_code   AS source_code,
    vc2.concept_id          AS target_concept_id
FROM tmp_prescriptions_clean src
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON vc.concept_code = src.route_source_code
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_drug_route'
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build mapped drugs and insert
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_mapped;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_mapped AS
SELECT
    src.subject_id                                                      AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                                                         AS hadm_id,
    COALESCE(vc_ndc.target_concept_id, vc_gcpt.target_concept_id, 0)    AS target_concept_id,
    COALESCE(vc_ndc.target_domain_id, vc_gcpt.target_domain_id, 'Drug') AS target_domain_id,
    src.start_datetime                                                  AS start_datetime,
    CASE
        WHEN src.end_datetime < src.start_datetime THEN src.start_datetime
        ELSE src.end_datetime
    END                                 AS end_datetime,
    32838                               AS type_concept_id,  -- EHR prescription
    src.quantity                        AS quantity,
    COALESCE(vc_route.target_concept_id, 0)                             AS route_concept_id,
    COALESCE(src.ndc_source_code, src.gcpt_source_code)                 AS source_code,
    COALESCE(vc_ndc.source_concept_id, vc_gcpt.source_concept_id, 0)    AS source_concept_id,
    src.route_source_code                                               AS route_source_code,
    src.dose_unit_source_code                                           AS dose_unit_source_code
FROM tmp_prescriptions_clean src
LEFT JOIN tmp_pr_ndc_concept vc_ndc
    ON src.ndc_source_code = vc_ndc.source_code
    AND vc_ndc.target_concept_id IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN tmp_pr_gcpt_concept vc_gcpt
    ON src.gcpt_source_code = vc_gcpt.source_code
    AND vc_gcpt.target_concept_id IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN tmp_pr_route_concept vc_route
    ON src.route_source_code = vc_route.source_code
    AND vc_route.target_concept_id IS NOT NULL
;

DELETE FROM drug_exposure;
INSERT INTO drug_exposure (drug_exposure_id, person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, drug_exposure_start_datetime, drug_exposure_end_date, drug_exposure_end_datetime, verbatim_end_date, drug_type_concept_id, stop_reason, refills, quantity, days_supply, sig, route_concept_id, lot_number, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, drug_source_value, drug_source_concept_id, route_source_value, dose_unit_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS drug_exposure_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    src.target_concept_id                   AS drug_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS drug_exposure_start_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS drug_exposure_start_datetime,
    CAST(src.end_datetime AS DATE)          AS drug_exposure_end_date,
    src.end_datetime                        AS drug_exposure_end_datetime,
    NULL::DATE                              AS verbatim_end_date,
    src.type_concept_id                     AS drug_type_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS stop_reason,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS refills,
    src.quantity                            AS quantity,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS days_supply,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS sig,
    src.route_concept_id                    AS route_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS lot_number,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    src.source_code                         AS drug_source_value,
    src.source_concept_id                   AS drug_source_concept_id,
    src.route_source_code                   AS route_source_value,
    src.dose_unit_source_code               AS dose_unit_source_value
FROM tmp_drug_mapped src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
WHERE src.target_domain_id = 'Drug'
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Also populate device_exposure from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".prescriptions mapped to Device domain
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DELETE FROM device_exposure;
INSERT INTO device_exposure (device_exposure_id, person_id, device_concept_id, device_exposure_start_date, device_exposure_start_datetime, device_exposure_end_date, device_exposure_end_datetime, device_type_concept_id, unique_device_id, quantity, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, device_source_value, device_source_concept_id)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS device_exposure_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    src.target_concept_id                   AS device_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS device_exposure_start_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS device_exposure_start_datetime,
    CAST(src.end_datetime AS DATE)          AS device_exposure_end_date,
    src.end_datetime                        AS device_exposure_end_datetime,
    src.type_concept_id                     AS device_type_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS unique_device_id,
    TRY_CAST(
        CASE WHEN ROUND(src.quantity) = src.quantity THEN src.quantity ELSE NULL END
        AS BIGINT)                          AS quantity,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    src.source_code                         AS device_source_value,
    src.source_concept_id                   AS device_source_concept_id
FROM tmp_drug_mapped src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
WHERE src.target_domain_id = 'Device'
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_prescriptions_clean;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_ndc_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_gcpt_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_pr_route_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_mapped;

name: 08_measurement.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 08_measurement.sql
-- Populate measurement from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".labevents + chartevents + microbiologyevents
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- ===================================================================
-- UNIT AND OPERATOR LOOKUP TABLES
-- ===================================================================

-- Operator concepts (<=, >=, <, >, =)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_meas_operator_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_meas_operator_concept AS
SELECT
    vc.concept_name     AS source_code,
    vc.concept_id       AS target_concept_id
FROM concept vc
WHERE vc.domain_id = 'Meas Value Operator'
;

-- Unit concepts (UCUM + custom)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_meas_unit_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_meas_unit_concept AS
SELECT
    vc.concept_code     AS source_code,
    vc2.concept_id      AS target_concept_id
FROM (
    SELECT concept_code, concept_id,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY concept_code ORDER BY UPPER(vocabulary_id)) AS rn
    FROM concept
    WHERE vocabulary_id IN ('UCUM', 'mimiciv_meas_unit', 'mimiciv_meas_wf_unit')
      AND domain_id = 'Unit'
) vc
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
WHERE vc.rn = 1
;

-- ===================================================================
-- RULE 1: LABS from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".labevents
-- ===================================================================

-- d_labitems concept lookup (demo has no loinc_code column, use itemid)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_labitems_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_d_labitems_concept AS
SELECT
    dlab.itemid                         AS itemid,
    CAST(dlab.itemid AS VARCHAR)        AS source_code,
    'mimiciv_meas_lab_loinc'            AS source_vocabulary_id,
    vc.concept_id                       AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id                       AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id                      AS target_concept_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".d_labitems dlab
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON vc.concept_code = CAST(dlab.itemid AS VARCHAR)
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_meas_lab_loinc'
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- Clean labevents
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_labevents_clean;
CREATE TABLE tmp_labevents_clean AS
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS measurement_id,
    src.subject_id              AS subject_id,
    src.charttime               AS start_datetime,
    src.hadm_id                 AS hadm_id,
    src.itemid                  AS itemid,
    src.value                   AS value,
    regexp_extract(src.value, '^(<=|>=|>|<|=|)')     AS value_operator,
    regexp_extract(src.value, '[-]?[\d]+[.]?[\d]*') AS value_number,
    CASE WHEN TRIM(src.valueuom) <> '' THEN src.valueuom ELSE NULL END AS valueuom,
    src.ref_range_lower         AS ref_range_lower,
    src.ref_range_upper         AS ref_range_upper
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".labevents src
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".d_labitems dlab ON src.itemid = dlab.itemid
;

DELETE FROM measurement;
INSERT INTO measurement (measurement_id, person_id, measurement_concept_id, measurement_date, measurement_datetime, measurement_time, measurement_type_concept_id, operator_concept_id, value_as_number, value_as_concept_id, unit_concept_id, range_low, range_high, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, measurement_source_value, measurement_source_concept_id, unit_source_value, value_source_value)
SELECT
    src.measurement_id                      AS measurement_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    COALESCE(labc.target_concept_id, 0)     AS measurement_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS measurement_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS measurement_datetime,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS measurement_time,
    32856                                   AS measurement_type_concept_id,  -- Lab
    opc.target_concept_id                   AS operator_concept_id,
    TRY_CAST(src.value_number AS DOUBLE)    AS value_as_number,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS value_as_concept_id,
    CASE WHEN src.valueuom IS NOT NULL
         THEN COALESCE(uc.target_concept_id, 0)
         ELSE NULL END                      AS unit_concept_id,
    src.ref_range_lower                     AS range_low,
    src.ref_range_upper                     AS range_high,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    CAST(src.itemid AS VARCHAR)             AS measurement_source_value,
    COALESCE(labc.source_concept_id, 0)     AS measurement_source_concept_id,
    src.valueuom                            AS unit_source_value,
    src.value                               AS value_source_value
FROM tmp_labevents_clean src
INNER JOIN tmp_d_labitems_concept labc ON labc.itemid = src.itemid
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(COALESCE(src.hadm_id, 0) AS VARCHAR)
LEFT JOIN tmp_meas_operator_concept opc ON opc.source_code = src.value_operator
LEFT JOIN tmp_meas_unit_concept uc ON uc.source_code = src.valueuom
WHERE COALESCE(labc.target_domain_id, 'Measurement') = 'Measurement'
;

-- ===================================================================
-- RULE 2: chartevents (ICU bedside monitoring)
-- ===================================================================

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_clean;
CREATE TABLE tmp_chartevents_clean AS
SELECT
    src.subject_id              AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                 AS hadm_id,
    src.stay_id                 AS stay_id,
    src.itemid                  AS itemid,
    CAST(src.itemid AS VARCHAR) AS source_code,
    di.label                    AS source_label,
    src.charttime               AS start_datetime,
    TRIM(src.value)             AS value,
    CASE
        WHEN regexp_full_match(TRIM(src.value), '[-]?[\d]+[.]?[\d]*[ ]*[a-z]+')
        THEN TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(src.value, '[-]?[\d]+[.]?[\d]*') AS DOUBLE)
        ELSE src.valuenum
    END                         AS valuenum,
    CASE
        WHEN regexp_full_match(TRIM(src.value), '[-]?[\d]+[.]?[\d]*[ ]*[a-z]+')
        THEN regexp_extract(src.value, '[a-z]+')
        ELSE src.valueuom
    END                         AS valueuom
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".chartevents src
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".d_items di ON src.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE
    di.label NOT LIKE '%Temperature'
    OR (di.label LIKE '%Temperature'
        AND CASE WHEN src.valueuom LIKE '%F%' THEN (src.valuenum - 32) * 5 / 9 ELSE src.valuenum END
            BETWEEN 25 AND 44)
;

-- Chartevents concept mapping
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_chartevents_concept AS
SELECT
    vc.concept_code         AS source_code,
    vc.vocabulary_id        AS source_vocabulary_id,
    vc.domain_id            AS source_domain_id,
    vc.concept_id           AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id           AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id          AS target_concept_id
FROM concept vc
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
WHERE vc.vocabulary_id IN ('mimiciv_meas_chart', 'mimiciv_meas_chartevents_value')
;

-- Chartevents mapped
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_mapped;
CREATE TABLE tmp_chartevents_mapped AS
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER () + (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(measurement_id), 0) FROM measurement) AS measurement_id,
    src.subject_id                  AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                     AS hadm_id,
    src.start_datetime              AS start_datetime,
    32817                           AS type_concept_id,  -- EHR
    src.source_code                 AS source_code,
    c_main.source_concept_id        AS source_concept_id,
    c_main.target_domain_id         AS target_domain_id,
    c_main.target_concept_id        AS target_concept_id,
    src.value                       AS value_source_value,
    CASE WHEN src.valuenum IS NULL AND src.value IS NOT NULL
         THEN COALESCE(c_value.target_concept_id, 0)
         ELSE NULL END              AS value_as_concept_id,
    src.valuenum                    AS value_as_number,
    src.valueuom                    AS unit_source_value,
    CASE WHEN src.valueuom IS NOT NULL
         THEN COALESCE(uc.target_concept_id, 0)
         ELSE NULL END              AS unit_concept_id
FROM tmp_chartevents_clean src
LEFT JOIN tmp_chartevents_concept c_main
    ON c_main.source_code = src.source_code
    AND c_main.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_meas_chart'
LEFT JOIN tmp_chartevents_concept c_value
    ON c_value.source_code = src.value
    AND c_value.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_meas_chartevents_value'
    AND c_value.target_domain_id = 'Meas Value'
LEFT JOIN tmp_meas_unit_concept uc
    ON uc.source_code = src.valueuom
;

-- Append chartevents measurements (do not delete lab data)
INSERT INTO measurement (measurement_id, person_id, measurement_concept_id, measurement_date, measurement_datetime, measurement_time, measurement_type_concept_id, operator_concept_id, value_as_number, value_as_concept_id, unit_concept_id, range_low, range_high, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, measurement_source_value, measurement_source_concept_id, unit_source_value, value_source_value)
SELECT
    src.measurement_id                      AS measurement_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    COALESCE(src.target_concept_id, 0)      AS measurement_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS measurement_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS measurement_datetime,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS measurement_time,
    src.type_concept_id                     AS measurement_type_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS operator_concept_id,
    src.value_as_number                     AS value_as_number,
    src.value_as_concept_id                 AS value_as_concept_id,
    src.unit_concept_id                     AS unit_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS range_low,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS range_high,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    src.source_code                         AS measurement_source_value,
    COALESCE(src.source_concept_id, 0)      AS measurement_source_concept_id,
    src.unit_source_value                   AS unit_source_value,
    src.value_source_value                  AS value_source_value
FROM tmp_chartevents_mapped src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
WHERE COALESCE(src.target_domain_id, 'Measurement') = 'Measurement'
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_labitems_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_labevents_clean;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_clean;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_meas_operator_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_meas_unit_concept;

name: 09_observation.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 09_observation.sql
-- Populate observation from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions (insurance, marital status,
-- language) and drgcodes
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Collect observation source data
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_observation_clean;
CREATE TABLE tmp_observation_clean AS
-- Rule 1: Insurance
SELECT
    src.subject_id          AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id             AS hadm_id,
    'Insurance'             AS source_code,
    46235654                AS target_concept_id,  -- Primary insurance
    src.admittime           AS start_datetime,
    src.insurance           AS value_as_string,
    'mimiciv_obs_insurance' AS source_vocabulary_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions src
WHERE src.insurance IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
-- Rule 2: Marital status
SELECT
    src.subject_id          AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id             AS hadm_id,
    'Marital status'        AS source_code,
    40766231                AS target_concept_id,  -- Marital status
    src.admittime           AS start_datetime,
    src.marital_status      AS value_as_string,
    'mimiciv_obs_marital'   AS source_vocabulary_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions src
WHERE src.marital_status IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
-- Rule 3: Language
SELECT
    src.subject_id          AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id             AS hadm_id,
    'Language'              AS source_code,
    40758030                AS target_concept_id,  -- Preferred language
    src.admittime           AS start_datetime,
    src.language            AS value_as_string,
    'mimiciv_obs_language'  AS source_vocabulary_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions src
WHERE src.language IS NOT NULL
;

-- Rule 4: DRG codes
INSERT INTO tmp_observation_clean
SELECT
    src.subject_id              AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                 AS hadm_id,
    src.drg_code                AS source_code,
    4296248                     AS target_concept_id,  -- Cost containment
    COALESCE(adm.edregtime, adm.admittime) AS start_datetime,
    src.description             AS value_as_string,
    'mimiciv_obs_drgcodes'      AS source_vocabulary_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".drgcodes src
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions adm ON src.hadm_id = adm.hadm_id
WHERE src.description IS NOT NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Map observation values to concepts
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_obs_value_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_obs_value_concept AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    src.value_as_string         AS source_code,
    src.source_vocabulary_id    AS source_vocabulary_id,
    vc2.concept_id              AS target_concept_id
FROM tmp_observation_clean src
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON src.value_as_string = vc.concept_code
    AND src.source_vocabulary_id = vc.vocabulary_id
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- observation
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DELETE FROM observation;
INSERT INTO observation (observation_id, person_id, observation_concept_id, observation_date, observation_datetime, observation_type_concept_id, value_as_number, value_as_string, value_as_concept_id, qualifier_concept_id, unit_concept_id, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, observation_source_value, observation_source_concept_id, unit_source_value, qualifier_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS observation_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    COALESCE(src.target_concept_id, 0)      AS observation_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS observation_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS observation_datetime,
    32817                                   AS observation_type_concept_id,  -- EHR
    NULL::DOUBLE                            AS value_as_number,
    src.value_as_string                     AS value_as_string,
    CASE WHEN src.value_as_string IS NOT NULL
         THEN COALESCE(lc.target_concept_id, 0)
         ELSE NULL END                      AS value_as_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS qualifier_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS unit_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    src.source_code                         AS observation_source_value,
    0                                       AS observation_source_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS unit_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS qualifier_source_value
FROM tmp_observation_clean src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
LEFT JOIN tmp_obs_value_concept lc
    ON src.value_as_string = lc.source_code
    AND src.source_vocabulary_id = lc.source_vocabulary_id
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Also insert diagnoses_icd mapped to Observation domain
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_diag_for_obs;
CREATE TABLE tmp_diag_for_obs AS
SELECT
    src.subject_id                      AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                         AS hadm_id,
    COALESCE(adm.edregtime, adm.admittime) AS start_datetime,
    src.icd_code                        AS source_code,
    vc.concept_id                       AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id                       AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id                      AS target_concept_id,
    32821                               AS type_concept_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".diagnoses_icd src
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".admissions adm ON src.hadm_id = adm.hadm_id
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON REPLACE(vc.concept_code, '.', '') = REPLACE(TRIM(src.icd_code), '.', '')
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = CASE
        WHEN src.icd_version = 9 THEN 'ICD9CM'
        WHEN src.icd_version = 10 THEN 'ICD10CM'
        ELSE NULL END
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
WHERE vc2.domain_id = 'Observation'
;

-- Append diagnoses mapped to Observation domain (do not delete previous data)
INSERT INTO observation (observation_id, person_id, observation_concept_id, observation_date, observation_datetime, observation_type_concept_id, value_as_number, value_as_string, value_as_concept_id, qualifier_concept_id, unit_concept_id, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, observation_source_value, observation_source_concept_id, unit_source_value, qualifier_source_value)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS observation_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    COALESCE(src.target_concept_id, 0)      AS observation_concept_id,
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)        AS observation_date,
    src.start_datetime                      AS observation_datetime,
    src.type_concept_id                     AS observation_type_concept_id,
    NULL::DOUBLE                            AS value_as_number,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS value_as_string,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS value_as_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS qualifier_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS unit_concept_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    src.source_code                         AS observation_source_value,
    COALESCE(src.source_concept_id, 0)      AS observation_source_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS unit_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS qualifier_source_value
FROM tmp_diag_for_obs src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_observation_clean;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_obs_value_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_diag_for_obs;

name: 10_observation_period.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 10_observation_period.sql
-- Derive observation_period from all event tables
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Collect min/max dates from all clinical event tables
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_obs_period_union;
CREATE TABLE tmp_obs_period_union AS
SELECT person_id, MIN(visit_start_date) AS start_date, MAX(visit_end_date) AS end_date
FROM visit_occurrence GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(condition_start_date), MAX(COALESCE(condition_end_date, condition_start_date))
FROM condition_occurrence GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(procedure_date), MAX(procedure_date)
FROM procedure_occurrence GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(drug_exposure_start_date), MAX(drug_exposure_end_date)
FROM drug_exposure GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(device_exposure_start_date), MAX(COALESCE(device_exposure_end_date, device_exposure_start_date))
FROM device_exposure GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(measurement_date), MAX(measurement_date)
FROM measurement GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(observation_date), MAX(observation_date)
FROM observation GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(specimen_date), MAX(specimen_date)
FROM specimen GROUP BY person_id
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, MIN(death_date), MAX(death_date)
FROM death GROUP BY person_id
;

DELETE FROM observation_period;
INSERT INTO observation_period (observation_period_id, person_id, observation_period_start_date, observation_period_end_date, period_type_concept_id)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)            AS observation_period_id,
    person_id               AS person_id,
    MIN(start_date)         AS observation_period_start_date,
    MAX(end_date)           AS observation_period_end_date,
    32828                   AS period_type_concept_id  -- EHR episode record
FROM tmp_obs_period_union
GROUP BY person_id
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Finalize person: remove persons without observation_period (DQD)
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_person_final;
CREATE TABLE tmp_person_final AS
SELECT per.*
FROM person per
INNER JOIN observation_period op ON per.person_id = op.person_id
;

DELETE FROM person;

INSERT INTO person SELECT * FROM tmp_person_final;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_obs_period_union;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_person_final;

name: 11_specimen.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 11_specimen.sql
-- Populate specimen from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Build d_micro from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents (since d_micro table no longer exists)
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_micro;
CREATE TABLE tmp_d_micro AS
SELECT DISTINCT ab_itemid AS itemid, ab_name AS label, 'ANTIBIOTIC' AS category
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents WHERE ab_itemid IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT test_itemid, test_name, 'MICROTEST'
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents WHERE test_itemid IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT org_itemid, org_name, 'ORGANISM'
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents WHERE org_itemid IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT spec_itemid, spec_type_desc, 'SPECIMEN'
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents WHERE spec_itemid IS NOT NULL
;

-- Map d_micro items to concepts
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_micro_concept;
CREATE TABLE tmp_d_micro_concept AS
SELECT
    dm.itemid               AS itemid,
    CAST(dm.itemid AS VARCHAR) AS source_code,
    dm.label                AS source_label,
    'mimiciv_micro_' || LOWER(dm.category) AS source_vocabulary_id,
    vc.concept_id           AS source_concept_id,
    vc2.domain_id           AS target_domain_id,
    vc2.concept_id          AS target_concept_id
FROM tmp_d_micro dm
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON CAST(dm.itemid AS VARCHAR) = vc.concept_code
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_micro_' || LOWER(dm.category)
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
;

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Specimen from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents (one per distinct spec_itemid per event)
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_specimen_clean;
CREATE TABLE tmp_specimen_clean AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                                AS specimen_id,
    src.subject_id                              AS subject_id,
    src.hadm_id                                 AS hadm_id,
    COALESCE(src.charttime, src.chartdate)      AS start_datetime,
    src.spec_itemid                             AS spec_itemid,
    mc.source_code                              AS source_code,
    mc.source_concept_id                        AS source_concept_id,
    COALESCE(mc.target_domain_id, 'Specimen')   AS target_domain_id,
    mc.target_concept_id                        AS target_concept_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".microbiologyevents src
INNER JOIN tmp_d_micro_concept mc
    ON src.spec_itemid = mc.itemid
    AND mc.source_vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_micro_specimen'
;

DELETE FROM specimen;
INSERT INTO specimen (specimen_id, person_id, specimen_concept_id, specimen_type_concept_id, specimen_date, specimen_datetime, quantity, unit_concept_id, anatomic_site_concept_id, disease_status_concept_id, specimen_source_id, specimen_source_value, unit_source_value, anatomic_site_source_value, disease_status_source_value)
SELECT
    src.specimen_id                     AS specimen_id,
    per.person_id                       AS person_id,
    COALESCE(src.target_concept_id, 0)  AS specimen_concept_id,
    32856                               AS specimen_type_concept_id,  -- Lab
    CAST(src.start_datetime AS DATE)    AS specimen_date,
    src.start_datetime                  AS specimen_datetime,
    NULL::DOUBLE                        AS quantity,
    NULL::BIGINT                        AS unit_concept_id,
    0                                   AS anatomic_site_concept_id,
    0                                   AS disease_status_concept_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS specimen_source_id,
    src.source_code                     AS specimen_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS unit_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS anatomic_site_source_value,
    NULL::VARCHAR                       AS disease_status_source_value
FROM tmp_specimen_clean src
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
WHERE src.target_domain_id = 'Specimen'
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_micro;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_d_micro_concept;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_specimen_clean;

name: 12_device_exposure.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 12_device_exposure.sql
-- Populate device_exposure from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".chartevents mapped to Device domain
-- (device_exposure from "ds_mimic_iv_raw".prescriptions is already handled in 09_drug_exposure.sql)
-- Source: "ds_mimic_iv_raw"
-- =====================================================================

-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Chartevents mapped to Device domain
-- Uses tmp_chartevents_mapped from step 10 — but since it was dropped,
-- we rebuild the mapping inline
-- -------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Append chartevents devices (do not delete prescriptions devices from script 07)
INSERT INTO device_exposure (device_exposure_id, person_id, device_concept_id, device_exposure_start_date, device_exposure_start_datetime, device_exposure_end_date, device_exposure_end_datetime, device_type_concept_id, unique_device_id, quantity, provider_id, visit_occurrence_id, visit_detail_id, device_source_value, device_source_concept_id)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS device_exposure_id,
    per.person_id                           AS person_id,
    COALESCE(vc2.concept_id, 0)             AS device_concept_id,
    CAST(src.charttime AS DATE)             AS device_exposure_start_date,
    src.charttime                           AS device_exposure_start_datetime,
    CAST(src.charttime AS DATE)             AS device_exposure_end_date,
    src.charttime                           AS device_exposure_end_datetime,
    32817                                   AS device_type_concept_id,  -- EHR
    NULL::VARCHAR                           AS unique_device_id,
    TRY_CAST(
        CASE WHEN ROUND(src.valuenum) = src.valuenum THEN src.valuenum ELSE NULL END
        AS BIGINT)                          AS quantity,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS provider_id,
    vis.visit_occurrence_id                 AS visit_occurrence_id,
    NULL::BIGINT                            AS visit_detail_id,
    CAST(src.itemid AS VARCHAR)             AS device_source_value,
    COALESCE(vc.concept_id, 0)              AS device_source_concept_id
FROM "ds_mimic_iv_raw".chartevents src
INNER JOIN "ds_mimic_iv_raw".d_items di ON src.itemid = di.itemid
INNER JOIN person per
    ON CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) = per.person_source_value
INNER JOIN visit_occurrence vis
    ON vis.visit_source_value =
        CAST(src.subject_id AS VARCHAR) || '|' || CAST(src.hadm_id AS VARCHAR)
LEFT JOIN concept vc
    ON vc.concept_code = CAST(src.itemid AS VARCHAR)
    AND vc.vocabulary_id = 'mimiciv_meas_chart'
LEFT JOIN concept_relationship vcr
    ON vc.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_1
    AND vcr.relationship_id = 'Maps to'
LEFT JOIN concept vc2
    ON vc2.concept_id = vcr.concept_id_2
    AND vc2.standard_concept = 'S'
    AND vc2.invalid_reason IS NULL
WHERE vc2.domain_id = 'Device'
;

name: 14_condition_era.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 14_condition_era.sql
-- Derive condition_era from condition_occurrence
-- Standard OHDSI algorithm with 30-day persistence window
-- =====================================================================

-- Step 1: Target conditions (exclude unmapped)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_target;
CREATE TABLE tmp_cond_target AS
SELECT
    co.condition_occurrence_id          AS condition_occurrence_id,
    co.person_id                        AS person_id,
    co.condition_concept_id             AS condition_concept_id,
    co.condition_start_date             AS condition_start_date,
    COALESCE(co.condition_end_date,
             co.condition_start_date + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS condition_end_date
FROM condition_occurrence co
WHERE co.condition_concept_id != 0
;

-- Step 2: Create date events (start = -1, end+30d = +1)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_dates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_cond_dates AS
SELECT person_id, condition_concept_id,
       condition_start_date AS event_date, -1 AS event_type,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id, condition_concept_id
                          ORDER BY condition_start_date) AS start_ordinal
FROM tmp_cond_target
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, condition_concept_id,
       CAST(condition_end_date + INTERVAL 30 DAY AS DATE), 1, NULL
FROM tmp_cond_target
;

-- Step 3: Row numbering for era detection
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_rows;
CREATE TABLE tmp_cond_rows AS
SELECT
    person_id, condition_concept_id, event_date, event_type,
    MAX(start_ordinal) OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, condition_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type
        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
    ) AS start_ordinal,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, condition_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type
    ) AS overall_ord
FROM tmp_cond_dates
;

-- Step 4: Find era end dates
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_enddates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_cond_enddates AS
SELECT person_id, condition_concept_id,
       CAST(event_date - INTERVAL 30 DAY AS DATE) AS end_date
FROM tmp_cond_rows
WHERE (2 * start_ordinal) - overall_ord = 0
;

-- Step 5: Match conditions to eras
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_ends;
CREATE TABLE tmp_cond_ends AS
SELECT
    c.person_id, c.condition_concept_id,
    c.condition_start_date,
    MIN(e.end_date) AS era_end_date
FROM tmp_cond_target c
JOIN tmp_cond_enddates e
    ON c.person_id = e.person_id
    AND c.condition_concept_id = e.condition_concept_id
    AND e.end_date >= c.condition_start_date
GROUP BY c.condition_occurrence_id, c.person_id,
         c.condition_concept_id, c.condition_start_date
;

-- Step 6: Insert condition eras
DELETE FROM condition_era;
INSERT INTO condition_era (condition_era_id, person_id, condition_concept_id, condition_era_start_date, condition_era_end_date, condition_occurrence_count)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                AS condition_era_id,
    person_id                   AS person_id,
    condition_concept_id        AS condition_concept_id,
    MIN(condition_start_date)   AS condition_era_start_date,
    era_end_date                AS condition_era_end_date,
    COUNT(*)                    AS condition_occurrence_count
FROM tmp_cond_ends
GROUP BY person_id, condition_concept_id, era_end_date
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_target;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_dates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_rows;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_enddates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_cond_ends;

name: 15_drug_era.sql
content:
-- =====================================================================
-- 15_drug_era.sql
-- Derive drug_era from drug_exposure
-- Standard OHDSI algorithm: roll up to Ingredient level,
-- 30-day persistence window
-- =====================================================================

-- Step 1: Map drug exposures to ingredient level via concept_ancestor
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_ingredient;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_ingredient AS
SELECT DISTINCT
    ca.descendant_concept_id    AS descendant_concept_id,
    ca.ancestor_concept_id      AS ingredient_concept_id
FROM concept_ancestor ca
JOIN concept c
    ON ca.ancestor_concept_id = c.concept_id
    AND c.vocabulary_id IN ('RxNorm', 'RxNorm Extension')
    AND c.concept_class_id = 'Ingredient'
;

-- Step 2: Build pre-target (drug exposure linked to ingredient)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_pretarget;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_pretarget AS
SELECT
    d.drug_exposure_id          AS drug_exposure_id,
    d.person_id                 AS person_id,
    v.ingredient_concept_id     AS ingredient_concept_id,
    d.drug_exposure_start_date  AS drug_exposure_start_date,
    d.drug_exposure_end_date    AS drug_exposure_end_date
FROM drug_exposure d
JOIN tmp_drug_ingredient v
    ON v.descendant_concept_id = d.drug_concept_id
WHERE d.drug_concept_id != 0
;

-- Step 3: Sub-exposure end dates
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_dates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_sub_dates AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
       drug_exposure_start_date AS event_date, -1 AS event_type,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
                          ORDER BY drug_exposure_start_date) AS start_ordinal
FROM tmp_drug_pretarget
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
       drug_exposure_end_date, 1, NULL
FROM tmp_drug_pretarget
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_rows;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_sub_rows AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id, event_date, event_type,
    MAX(start_ordinal) OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
    ) AS start_ordinal,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type
    ) AS overall_ord
FROM tmp_drug_sub_dates
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_enddates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_sub_enddates AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id, event_date AS end_date
FROM tmp_drug_sub_rows
WHERE (2 * start_ordinal) - overall_ord = 0
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_ends;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_sub_ends AS
SELECT
    dt.person_id, dt.ingredient_concept_id,
    dt.drug_exposure_start_date,
    MIN(e.end_date) AS drug_sub_exposure_end_date
FROM tmp_drug_pretarget dt
JOIN tmp_drug_sub_enddates e
    ON dt.person_id = e.person_id
    AND dt.ingredient_concept_id = e.ingredient_concept_id
    AND e.end_date >= dt.drug_exposure_start_date
GROUP BY dt.drug_exposure_id, dt.person_id,
         dt.ingredient_concept_id, dt.drug_exposure_start_date
;

-- Step 4: Build sub-exposures
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_sub AS
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
                       drug_sub_exposure_end_date
                       ORDER BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id) AS row_number,
    person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
    MIN(drug_exposure_start_date) AS drug_sub_exposure_start_date,
    drug_sub_exposure_end_date,
    COUNT(*) AS drug_exposure_count
FROM tmp_drug_sub_ends
GROUP BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id, drug_sub_exposure_end_date
;

-- Step 5: Era-level aggregation with 30-day window
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_dates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_era_dates AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
       drug_sub_exposure_start_date AS event_date, -1 AS event_type,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
                          ORDER BY drug_sub_exposure_start_date) AS start_ordinal
FROM tmp_drug_sub
UNION ALL
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
       CAST(drug_sub_exposure_end_date + INTERVAL 30 DAY AS DATE), 1, NULL
FROM tmp_drug_sub
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_rows;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_era_rows AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id, event_date, event_type,
    MAX(start_ordinal) OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
    ) AS start_ordinal,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id
        ORDER BY event_date, event_type
    ) AS overall_ord
FROM tmp_drug_era_dates
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_enddates;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_era_enddates AS
SELECT person_id, ingredient_concept_id,
       CAST(event_date - INTERVAL 30 DAY AS DATE) AS end_date
FROM tmp_drug_era_rows
WHERE (2 * start_ordinal) - overall_ord = 0
;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_ends;
CREATE TABLE tmp_drug_era_ends AS
SELECT
    ft.person_id, ft.ingredient_concept_id,
    ft.drug_sub_exposure_start_date,
    MIN(e.end_date) AS drug_era_end_date,
    ft.drug_exposure_count,
    ft.drug_sub_exposure_end_date::DATE - ft.drug_sub_exposure_start_date::DATE AS days_exposed
FROM tmp_drug_sub ft
JOIN tmp_drug_era_enddates e
    ON ft.person_id = e.person_id
    AND ft.ingredient_concept_id = e.ingredient_concept_id
    AND e.end_date >= ft.drug_sub_exposure_start_date
GROUP BY ft.person_id, ft.ingredient_concept_id,
         ft.drug_sub_exposure_start_date, ft.drug_sub_exposure_end_date,
         ft.drug_exposure_count
;

-- Step 6: Insert drug eras
DELETE FROM drug_era;
INSERT INTO drug_era (drug_era_id, person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_era_start_date, drug_era_end_date, drug_exposure_count, gap_days)
SELECT
    abs(hash(uuid()) % 2147483647)                            AS drug_era_id,
    person_id                               AS person_id,
    ingredient_concept_id                   AS drug_concept_id,
    MIN(drug_sub_exposure_start_date)       AS drug_era_start_date,
    drug_era_end_date                       AS drug_era_end_date,
    SUM(drug_exposure_count)                AS drug_exposure_count,
    drug_era_end_date::DATE - MIN(drug_sub_exposure_start_date)::DATE - SUM(days_exposed) AS gap_days
FROM tmp_drug_era_ends
GROUP BY person_id, ingredient_concept_id, drug_era_end_date
;

-- Cleanup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_ingredient;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_pretarget;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_dates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_rows;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_enddates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub_ends;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_sub;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_dates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_rows;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_enddates;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_drug_era_ends;

-- Also keep tmp_visit_clean around for reference (it was used in step 05)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_visit_clean;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_chartevents_mapped;
